azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.agent.tool_calls'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), status=tostring(Properties['mcp.status'])
| summarize value=sum(todouble(Sum)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), status
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.agent.tool_calls'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), tool=tostring(Properties['mcp.tool'])
| summarize calls=sum(todouble(Sum)) by tool
| order by calls desc
| take 12

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.agent.tool_duration_ms'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), tool=tostring(Properties['mcp.tool']), value=iff(todouble(ItemCount) > 0, todouble(Sum) / todouble(ItemCount), todouble(Sum))
| summarize avg(value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), tool
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.events'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), event_name=tostring(Properties['event.name']), tool=tostring(Properties['mcp.tool']), status=tostring(Properties['mcp.status'])
| where event_name == 'agent.tool_call' and status in ('failed', 'denied')
| project TimeGenerated, tool, status
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.http.server.duration_ms' and AppRoleName has 'researchops-mcp'
| extend DurationMs=iff(todouble(ItemCount) > 0, todouble(Sum) / todouble(ItemCount), todouble(Sum))
| summarize p95=percentile(DurationMs, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.events'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), event_name=tostring(Properties['event.name']), delegated=tostring(Properties['delegated_user.id'])
| where event_name == 'agent.tool_call'
| summarize value=dcount(delegated)
